calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Amend Judgment To Change Plaintiff'S Name And Order Thereon
Off Calendar Nov-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LHR, INC., ASSIGNEE OF CRESCENT JEWELER's Motion To Amend Judgment To Change Plaintiff's Name And Order Thereon.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The moving party did not serve the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, plus 10 calendar days for service by mail outside the State of California, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
